URI.DisableExternal TYPE: bool VERSION: 1.2.0 DEFAULT: false --DESCRIPTION-- Disables links to external websites. This is a highly effective anti-spam and anti-pagerank-leech measure, but comes at a hefty price: nolinks or images outside of your domain will be allowed. Non-linkified URIs will still be preserved. If you want to be able to link to subdomains or use absolute URIs, specify %URI.Host for your website. --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
